overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a walk along a futuristic covered bridge lined with colorful banners, approaching the MAST building entrance in a futuristic city, then turning onto a curved waterfront promenade with views of the distant cityscape.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a futuristic covered bridge adorned with colorful ceremonial banners. The walkway is flanked by water canals on both sides and leads toward the imposing MAST building entrance in the distance. The architecture features clean white lines with blue accents, and sunlight streams through the curved roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: MAST building entrance plaza under overhang

events.description: passing from open covered bridge into the shadow of the MAST building entrance overhang

agents.ego_description: approaching the MAST building entrance stairs, moving under the large curved overhang structure

entered.detail: large metallic 'MAS' lettering mounted on the building facade above the entrance
wide white staircase leading up to the building's glass entrance doors
curved white and blue support pillars with organic flowing design
curved white and blue support pillars with organic flowing design

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive overhang of the MAST building, transitioning from the open bridge to the sheltered entrance plaza. The 'MAS' signage becomes prominent above the wide entrance stairs. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and shadow as the camera approaches the building's glass facade, passing between the curved structural columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront promenade with city views

events.description: turning right onto curved waterfront path instead of ascending the entrance stairs
view opens up to reveal distant futuristic cityscape and towers across the water

agents.ego_description: turning right at the entrance and following the curved waterfront promenade along the building's exterior

entered.detail: walkway curving along the water's edge with hexagonal tile pattern
calm water surface with floating green lily pads
futuristic buildings and towers visible across the water in the distance
distant building with bright blue neon lighting visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the MAST building entrance, the camera follows a curved waterfront promenade that reveals a sweeping view of the futuristic cityscape across the water. The path runs alongside the building under a curved ceiling structure, with lily pads floating in the water to the left and distant towers visible through the haze. The architecture transitions from the formal entrance to a more open, scenic walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a ceremonial bridge toward a massive architectural entrance and finally onto a scenic waterfront promenade. It begins with a walk along a futuristic covered bridge adorned with colorful banners, where sunlight streams through a curved roof over flanking water canals. As the camera advances, the open bridge transitions into the sheltered entrance plaza of the MAST building, moving under a massive overhang where the lighting shifts into shadow beneath prominent signage and curved structural columns. The scene then turns right at the glass facade to follow a curved walkway, shifting from the formal entrance to an open promenade. Finally, the view expands across the water to reveal floating lily pads and a sweeping vista of a distant, hazy futuristic cityscape.
